impact: This maps committed public inventory categories back to the original PP&D source landscape, identifies uncovered source categories deterministically, and keeps the workflow fixture-only with no live crawl or private DevHub artifacts.
summary: Adds a fixture-only PP&D public source inventory coverage report with a narrow validator and tests.
target_task: Task checkbox-72: Add a fixture-only public source inventory coverage report that maps existing inventory categories to the original PP&D source landscape and flags missing categories without crawling live sites.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
